violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sink and surface sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2025
The walk-in cooler fans have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Refrigerator door gasket on the walk in cooler was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2023
The coving in the prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2023
